parentQuestion: A genetic disease causes undigested material to accumulate in cells, leading to ...

scaffolds.q: Lysosomes contain ___ enzymes that break down materials.
scaffolds.explain: Lysosomes are packed with hydrolytic enzymes — enzymes that use water to break chemical bonds and digest macromolecules. They're the cell's demolition crew, darling. Hold the line here:.

scaffolds.q: An enzyme is a type of ___ that speeds up chemical reactions.
scaffolds.explain: Enzymes are proteins that catalyze (speed up) specific chemical reactions without being consumed in the process. They're biological catalysts — the cell's efficiency experts. Open yourself to this:impressed.
